title: Mask Building Idea
author: Erica Wells

steps_raw.instruction: Make your pattern. Cut out your first set and use them for tracing. No need for perfection. The felt is around 9 x 12 inches. It's not wildly important that the measurements are exact. It's the shapes really. As long as it fits your face.
Glue bottom to front. Match up curved edges.
Glue top to front so that it can be tucked under the bottom. Glue along edges.
Cut 6 1/2 inches of beading wire. Use pliers to curl ends.
Glue wire into bottom part of mask. Glue to edge.
Apply glue to wire curls liberally. Allow time to dry.
Cut 2 1/2 inches of flat wire and glue to front. This will be used to adjust over the nose.
Cut about 12 to 14 inches of elastic x 2
Tuck inner front into mask. No need for perfection.
Fit snuggly to face. Use wires to form. Apply like n95. YouTube “n95 mask application” if needed
